URL: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd
Language: go
Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charmbracelet/crush
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charmbracelet/crush
Language: go
Glamourous agentic coding for all 💘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/go-ethereum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum
Language: go
Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: golang/go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/golang/go
Language: go
The Go programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/adk-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/adk-go
Language: go
An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/gvisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/gvisor
Language: go
Application Kernel for Containers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juanfont/headscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juanfont/headscale
Language: go
An open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/kubernetes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes
Language: go
Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: larksuite/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/larksuite/cli
Language: go
The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opencode-ai/opencode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opencode-ai/opencode
Language: go
A powerful AI coding agent. Built for the terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei
Language: go
Nuclei is a fast, customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community and built on a simple YAML-based DSL, enabling collaboration to tackle trending vulnerabilities on the internet. It helps you find vulnerabilities in your applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/prometheus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus
Language: go
The Prometheus monitoring system and time series database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sipeed/picoclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw
Language: go
Tiny, Fast, and Deployable anywhere — automate the mundane, unleash your creativity

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spf13/viper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spf13/viper
Language: go
Go configuration with fangs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stretchr/testify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stretchr/testify
Language: go
A toolkit with common assertions and mocks that plays nicely with the standard library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: swaggo/swag
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/swaggo/swag
Language: go
Automatically generate RESTful API documentation with Swagger 2.0 for Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailscale/tailscale
